article.title: Uber L4 chances
article.content:
Last month i had uber interviews for l4 role

Phone Screen - Positive
moved to onsite rounds

DSA Round - Positive
Machine Coding - Positive
HLD - Positive
HM (Behavioural) - Everything went well, but forgot to ask questions about team at the end when i was given oppurtunity, by the time i realized its already too late.

Can someone please tell how badly this effects and what are the chances of being selected.

post.content: If feedbacks are conveyed by recruiter as "positive", then you are good..\nBut if these were loop round then only after consolidated feedback things will be clear
Could you please share the questions you were asked during the rounds? I have an upcoming phone screening for Uber L4.\nThanks in advance
what did they ask in hld?
System design round is the most important round where most people fail for L4. You are good.
I also didn\'t ask questions about team but got offer.
